ANSTRAT-1670.summary: Evolve Ansible Content in support of Agentic Orchestration — 3 initiatives: (1) Ecosystem, Discovery & Distribution (external marketplace presence, Lightforge catalog, internal Tier 2 marketplace, MCP discovery endpoint), (2) Technical Foundations (content type extensibility framework, skill marketplace backend, platform context model), (3) Strategic Domain Content & GTM (certified/validated collections, Tier 1+2 skills, agent composition research). Covers the full content lifecycle for collections, EEs, skills, and future content types.
